objective: Implement the canonical workspace freshness, trust, writability, continuity, and protected-composition projection family for the staff shell.
forbiddenLocalShortcuts: Do not let route visibility imply mutation authority.
Do not let par_242 co-own WorkspaceContinuityEvidenceProjection.
Do not collapse trust, continuity, and interruption into one boolean posture.
mandatoryTests: writable versus preview-only posture derives from trust plus lease
continuity evidence persists across same-shell route changes
trust downgrade freezes protected composition without dropping evidence visibility
anchor repair emits explicit continuity reason codes
failClosedConditions: Missing lease or trust tuple blocks writable posture.
